title: Enchantment MAX
description: Max level of enchantments are now 255! NO COMMANDS! All available in creative, and combined in survival!
body:
# All Enchantments are max level 255.
### NO MORE COMMANDS NEEDED
All enchanted books can be found in the creative menu OR you can combine them with books.

Enchanting Table max lvl is unaffected.

Enchant with joy!

### Note: 
Lure is capped at lvl 5, anything above that and the fishing rod stops working.

Silk Touch and Infinity is unaffected since higher than lvl 1 doesnt do anything.
